user.title: MCP Webhook Proxy
user.description: This integration is managed by the Webhook Proxy for HA MCP add-on. It proxies MCP requests via a webhook for remote access.

abort.already_configured: MCP Webhook Proxy is already configured.

oauth_restart_required.title: Restart Home Assistant to enable OAuth

confirm.title: Restart Home Assistant?
confirm.description:
OAuth was enabled in the MCP Webhook Proxy add-on, but the new OAuth-enforcing integration code has not been loaded into Home Assistant yet. Submitting this form will restart Home Assistant so the new code takes effect; the webhook URL will then enforce OAuth.

Click **Submit** to restart now.

update_restart_required.title: Restart Home Assistant to finish the MCP Webhook Proxy update

confirm.title: Restart Home Assistant?
confirm.description:
The MCP Webhook Proxy integration was updated by the add-on, but Home Assistant is still running the previous version's code. Submitting this form will restart Home Assistant so the new code takes effect. The webhook keeps working with the previous version until then.

Click **Submit** to restart now.

refresh_repairs.name: Refresh repairs
refresh_repairs.description: Used by the Webhook Proxy add-on to raise or clear the click-to-restart Repair issues. Not intended for manual use.

issue_id.name: Issue
issue_id.description: Which restart Repair issue to raise or clear.

action.name: Action
action.description: Whether to create or clear the issue.
